messages.content: He is also best in his field
He is also best in his field
by him I meant Tanni Bhaiji
by him I meant Tanni Bhaiji

Dear Aditya
Thanks a lot for all yr help and support. All family members have a preference for him as we have been listening to him since 1981. Cannot go against their wishes. The program is scheduled on 26 Jan 2013 from 1 PM to 7 PM at our resi Monica Bldg 9B Lord Sinha Road Flat 3/1, near emami market/sikshayan school. Kolkata. Request you to kindly be a part of the program and help us in the organising it well.

With warm regards
Pawan Lohia
9903800354/9331110354

Dear Aditya

I connected with u due to yr interest in Baba Ramdeo. I want to get Rmadeoji ka Jumma done at home, can u suggest some good jumma singerfrom Kolkata. Thanks in advance.

Regards
Pawan Lohia
